generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor for position and velocity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, MotorVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for gearwheel position and velocity measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearPositionDataTransmitted, GearVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current (I_M) for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Motor position data streamed via MQTT from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Motor velocity data streamed via MQTT from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Gearwheel position data streamed via MQTT from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance GearVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Gearwheel velocity data streamed via MQTT from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) data streamed via MQTT from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensors
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from dynamics model using manufacturer parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousFrictionModel
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of the motor from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data of the motor from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance GearPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data of the gearwheel from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance GearVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data of the gearwheel from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) data from current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque (τ) derived from dynamics model using manufacturer parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MotionControlService
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling using Block Definition Diagrams and Internal Block Diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulating friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset management and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization system for real-time monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization dashboard for monitoring robot axis performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction models using white-box and black-box approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides IdentifiedFrictionParameters
]

instance MotionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion control accuracy improvement through friction parameter refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdatedControlAlgorithms
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis performance metrics"
]

instance IdentifiedFrictionParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters identified from data for model refinement"
]

instance UpdatedControlAlgorithms : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update robot control algorithms using refined friction parameters for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TwinningProcessMethodology : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology including problem identification, asset and model analysis, model creation, data identification; continuous refinement over operating time due to wear, tool changes, or application variations"
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller accepting position, speed, or acceleration inputs for robot motion control"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot; other axes not modeled. Comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox for motion control accuracy improvement"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT, but no specific frequency or time intervals specified in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating structural (SysML) and simulation (Simulink) models with live sensor data via MQTT, processed through computational components to produce traceable data traces for visualization in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, using live operational data during robot operation for continuous friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data; friction models validated against physical measurements with equations from [45]."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position, velocity) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) provide standardized integration capabilities, but specific external systems or data exchanges are not detailed in document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset management and SysML for systems engineering modeling."
]
